assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets a Content-Security-Policy header that includes frame-ancestors 'none' or frame-ancestors 'self'
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 9 states 'Use frame-ancestors none and object-src none as the minimum bar'

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets X-Frame-Options to DENY on IdentityServer UI paths
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 9 states 'X-Frame-Options: DENY' on all IdentityServer pages

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures rate limiting with AddRateLimiter and a policy for the token endpoint with PermitLimit = 20
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 10 states 'sliding window policy (e.g., 20 requests/minute per IP) for /connect/token'

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures rate limiting for the authorize endpoint with PermitLimit = 10
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 10 states 'fixed window policy (e.g., 10 requests/minute) for /connect/authorize'

assertions.assertion: Program.cs calls UseRateLimiter() in the middleware pipeline
assertions.rationale: SKILL.md Pattern 10 references AddRateLimiter which requires UseRateLimiter() in the pipeline
